case_title: OSTENBERG, TODD vs. PATEL, CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, \: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR ROGERS, JAMES MARTIN AS ATTORNEY FOR OSTENBERG, TODD

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-01-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-01-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE. NO APPEARANCE AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-02-1996 CONTINUED FROM NOV-01-1996 TO DEC-02-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSTENBERG, TODD AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, CHARLES MENTONE HOTEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-02-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-12-1996
